title: Universal Totem
description: This turns everything into a Totem Of Undying, everything you hold will save you like a totem of undying.
body: Turns Everything Into A Totem (Functionality Only), If you hold something and die, You will be revived like the Totem Of Undying. This Mod Turns Everything Into A Totem Of Undying (Only The Functionality Not The Totem Itself). **_Supports Modded Items_**
